title: How to Start Your Own Micronation in 2026!
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: A funny 2026 guide for ambitious castle-builders, island-dreamers, and barge enthusiasts, written so a kid can enjoy the absurdity while the adult quietly learns what real law and logistics allow.
